title: USGS Ecosystems Science
description: A USGS source card about ecosystems, biodiversity, invasive species, wildlife disease, and habitat change.
license: Public Domain / some linked media may vary

pages.text: USGS ecosystems resources address wildlife, habitats, invasive species, disease, changing landscapes, and data used to support conservation decisions.
Use this source for students reading environmental claims and tracing how evidence informs management decisions.
USGS materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some linked media may have separate credit or rights requirements. Check item-level rights.
